summary: Inference optimization continues to dominate with new frameworks and techniques. Several breakthroughs in long-context handling and memory efficiency.

items.title: Infinite-Context Transformers: O(1) Memory for Any Sequence Length
items.core_innovation: Uses hierarchical compression to maintain constant memory while processing arbitrarily long sequences.
items.significance: Removes a fundamental limitation of transformers, enabling new applications in long-form content.

trends: Memory efficiency becoming as important as speed
